commands.review_summary:
The PR threads the effective embedded `toolsAllow` list into local-model lean filtering and schema projection so explicitly runtime-allowed tools such as `message` survive lean mode, with focused tests.

PR surface: Source +26, Tests +65. Total +91 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main applies the lean deny list before the runtime allowlist can preserve `message`. I did not execute tests because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review and merge decision after accepting the focused proof gap.

target.title: fix(agents): preserve runtime tools in lean mode
target.body:
## Summary

- Preserve explicitly runtime-allowed tools when `localModelLean` applies its lightweight deny list.
- Thread the effective embedded `toolsAllow` list into tool construction and schema projection so runtime-required tools stay visible consistently.
- Add coverage for preserving `message` through lean mode and for wildcard allowlists not disabling lean mode wholesale.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.create-openclaw-coding-tools.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.ts src/agents/agent-tools.create-openclaw-coding-tools.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.ts src/agents/agent-tools.create-openclaw-coding-tools.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed`: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_6a88a219b188`, run `run_275f2fa6ede3`, exit `0`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`: clean, no accepted/actionable findings

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: `localModelLean` no longer strips a tool that the runtime explicitly allowed for the current run, such as `message` for reply-required runs.

Real environment tested: local focused Vitest/format/lint checks plus AWS Crabbox Linux `c7a.8xlarge` remote changed gate.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.create-openclaw-coding-tools.test.ts --reporter=dot`; `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 240m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`.

Evidence after fix: focused tests passed 65 tests across 2 Vitest shards; Crabbox run `run_275f2fa6ede3` completed `pnpm check:changed` with exit `0`.

Observed result after fix: lean local model mode still trims broad heavyweight defaults, but preserves explicitly requested runtime tools through construction and prompt/schema projection.

What was not tested: live provider/model execution was not run for this narrow tool filtering change.
target.author: vincentkoc
